name: Just found out about hearing loss from old job in Ogden—what's first step?
description: Audiogram + file claim now—1 yr clock ticking.[2]

mainEntity.name: Just found out about hearing loss from old job in Ogden—what's first step?

acceptedAnswer.text: Audiogram + file claim now—1 yr clock ticking.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Get audiogram immediately, notify employer/insurer in writing, file claim form with Utah Labor Commission.[2][5] Key factors: Within 1 yr last exposure, preserve evidence.[2] Don't wait for symptoms to worsen.[4] Free lawyer consult next.[5]
